steps.title: Identify the key constraint
steps.content: The audience is unfamiliar with Sam Maloof, so an effective description must identify the maker. The description must work for someone who doesn't know who he is.

steps.title: Match to the answer choices
steps.content: A identifies Sam Maloof as the creator while describing the chair's physical features (sleek, contoured armrests and seat, walnut) — essential information for an audience unfamiliar with Maloof. B and C waste space on biography and awards unrelated to describing the chair; D describes the chair but never identifies the maker. That matches choice A — A is correct.
